sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next: most people do not need it constantly. useful tool, but not an everyday necessity. not a whole-food nutrition star. most misc items are weak on raw nutrient profile. rarely deserves to be treated as a foundation food. most of these are situational, not core nutrition plays.
